pilot.description: Core is onboarding a limited number of pilot partners across the UK and Middle East to support first-phase deployment of the Human Performance Engine, for organisations taking a proactive approach to safety, performance and efficiency through data-driven systems.

intro.title: Products
paragraphs: core+ develops intelligent software that helps organisations plan work, protect people and improve operational performance.

hpe.name: Human Performance Engine (HPE)
hpe.tagline: Intelligent workforce planning and operational decision support.
desc: The core+ Human Performance Engine (HPE) is a modular operational intelligence platform that helps organisations make safer, more informed workforce planning decisions.

Rather than simply allocating available people to work, HPE evaluates operational demand, workforce capability, competency, fatigue exposure and task-specific risk to determine the most appropriate workforce while protecting future operational readiness.
Following manager approval, the platform can be extended to generate operational documentation directly from the approved work plan, creating a complete workflow from planning through to execution.
hpe.coreModulesNote: When these are all combined together a Fit for Duty index is created, this is the intelligent support for the HPE.
hpe.pitch: Plan smarter. Protect people. Improve operational performance.

hpeDetail.title: How it works
paragraphs: Traditional workforce planning systems focus on resource availability. The core+ Human Performance Engine focuses on operational readiness.

By combining operational work planning, competency assurance, fatigue management, task risk assessment and workforce recommendations within a single platform, HPE enables organisations to optimise operational plans before work begins.

Rather than replacing operational managers, HPE provides intelligent decision support by projecting workforce readiness, identifying emerging operational risks and recommending practical mitigations that improve safety, efficiency and resilience.
capabilities: Work Plan / Work Order import Function

environmental.name: Weather Analysis Program (WAP)
environmental.tagline: Predict operational disruption before it happens.
desc: The core+ weather analysis program provides advanced environmental monitoring for all weather events, including sand / dust management for safety-critical infrastructure.

By combining weather intelligence, wind behaviour, environmental conditions and site monitoring, organisations receive early warning of operational disruption before safety, performance or productivity are affected.
Designed specifically for infrastructure operating in exposed and challenging environments.

station.name: Smart Safety & Performance Station
station.tagline: Connected workforce. Real-time visibility. Improved operational control.
desc: A connected operational interface designed to improve workforce communication, workforce visibility and operational awareness across depots, compounds and worksites.
The platform provides employees with immediate access to operational information while improving management visibility of workforce activity.
capabilities: Depot and site induction and emergency planning

dpe.name: Document Production Engine (DPE)
dpe.intro: Generate accurate, standards-compliant documents in seconds. Reduce manual effort, ensure consistency and maintain full compliance across your operations.

features.title: Smart document generation
features.desc: AI-powered engine creates accurate RAMS, permits and compliance documents in seconds.

features.title: Built-in compliance
features.desc: Pre-built templates aligned to industry standards and regulatory requirements.

features.title: Live data integration
features.desc: Pulls data from your plans, systems and risk inputs to ensure accuracy and consistency.

features.title: Save time. Reduce risk.
features.desc: Eliminate duplicate work, reduce errors and keep your team focused on delivery.

bespoke.name: Bespoke Systems Development
desc: Where standard products cannot fully address operational requirements, core+ designs and develops bespoke technology solutions tailored to specific operational environments.
From standalone applications through to enterprise-wide operational platforms, every solution is designed around real operational challenges, existing workflows and measurable business outcomes.
